cover.era_chip: 佛敎 · 儒敎 · 道敎
cover.subtitle:
고구려·백제·신라,
순서까지 외워야 한다.
cover.imagePrompt: Three Kingdoms Buddhism arrival illustration, 4th century. ONE foreign monk figure (Sundo) in saffron robe with shaven head, holding a sutra scroll, walking through a Goguryeo palace gate where a king kneels in greeting. Background: temple eaves under construction and pine forest. Composition: solemn arrival, threshold. Color: saffron + clay-brown + gold + jade. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"고구려 372 → 백제 384 → 신라 527"
불교 수용 순서를 외운다.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 원효(화쟁·아미타·무애가)와 의상(화엄종·부석사·일승법계도)을 헷갈리게 묻는다. 교종(중대·왕실·귀족)과 선종(하대·호족·9산 선문)의 시기·후원 세력 대비도 단골 포인트다.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open lotus sutra book icon shown from a slight angle. RIGHT: a small white incense burner silhouette suggesting Baekje gilt-bronze incense. Cream #F2EDE3 base + saffron #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
